limitations: AI investment intensity scored 4 rather than 5: R&D spend increase is directional/qualitative only; no specific annual AI R&D dollar amount disclosed in excerpts
Narrative concreteness scored 4: MCP integration and Autodesk AI platform described as deployed/in-production but no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) found in excerpts
Aether acquisition ($131M) is the only hard dollar figure directly tied to AI; restructuring charges are partially AI-attributable but not exclusively so

Risk disclosure depth scored 4: multiple company-specific risk mechanisms described with regulatory specificity (EU AI Act, state laws, cybersecurity, bias liability) but no quantified risk exposure or named AI governance oversight body found in excerpts
